answers: Big Bang = universe began ~13.8 billion years ago from an incredibly hot, dense state and has been expanding ever since.
Evidence: cosmic microwave background radiation, universe expansion (Hubble), abundance of light elements, and galaxy evolution.
Timeline: Big Bang → inflation → nucleosynthesis → atoms form → first stars → galaxies → solar system → us.
Common misconception: Big Bang wasn't an explosion IN space — it was the expansion OF space itself. There was no 'center'.
